editorial.title: CHASE THE HIGH RELEASE
editorial.subtitle: Single-bowler pose draft with shaped freeze timing
editorial.fallback_insight: The release peaks high, then the body folds hard through follow-through.
editorial.fallback_takeaway: Keep the release tall before you collapse forward.
editorial.fallback_release_note: Freeze frame: the torso is still driving after the ball has gone.
editorial.fallback_finish_note: Follow-through: chest drops and the trail leg swings across quickly.
